noServer.title: No eligible guild
noServer.description:
None of your guilds is currently registered for RaidOps. RaidOps requires you to be an administrator of a Discord server to register one yourself.
Join or create a Discord server, then come back here.

register.title: No guild registered
register.description: None of your guilds is currently registered for RaidOps. Being administrator of the following servers, you can register one yourself to start using RaidOps
